tagline: Beginner → Navamsa, faithful to classical Jyotisha

notes_files: 4th Class - 28th Feb 2026 JA-MODULE 3 - HOROSCOPE, SIGNS & HOUSES.pdf
4th Class - 28th Feb 2026  JA-MODULE 3 - HOROSCOPE, SIGNS & HOUSES-DECK.pdf
sources.author: Bavani Shanmugam, Malaysian Astrological Society

directory_structure.raw/: Extracted plain-text + CSV from all source files
directory_structure.content/: Learning content — curriculum, flashcards, quiz, exercises

kb_files.grahas.json: 9 Grahas: karakatwas, dignity, aspects, friendships, avasthas, yogas
kb_files.rasis.json: 12 Rasis: qualities, elements, modalities, Kalapurusha body map
kb_files.bhavas.json: 12 Bhavas: significations, karakas, classifications, Yogakarakas, Badhakas
kb_files.nakshatras.json: 27 Nakshatras: lords, spans, 108 padas with navamsa/purushartha mapping
kb_files.d9_navamsa.json: D9 division rules, Vargottama, pada→navamsa mapping
kb_files.fundamentals.json: 20 core principles that repeat across the system

content_files.quiz.json: Per-level quiz banks Q1–Q7 (MCQ + match + scenario)
content_files.exercises.json: Chart-filling drills and 2 fully-worked assignment examples

next_phases.phase_2_app_shell: Next.js + Tailwind app reading these JSON files: lesson viewer, flashcards with SRS, quiz engine, progress tracking (localStorage)
next_phases.phase_3_chart_engine: Swiss Ephemeris integration for birth-chart + D9 generation; South-Indian + North-Indian renderers

notes: All content is ingested from the original notes. Classical cross-checks (BPHS, Jaimini) used where the notes were ambiguous. Rasi Purushartha pattern (Aries=Dharma etc.) is standardised across modules. Rahu/Ketu exaltation uses the Taurus/Scorpio tradition from the M4 Day 2 exaltation table.
